untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking current portfolio exposure level (80-90% long-biased) and dynamic position sizing based on trader confidence/psychology state. These are portfolio-level constructs not available as price/technical indicators. Also requires systematic weekly reduction scheduling over 6-week window, which requires state management and time-based execution logic not expressible in static condition rules.
translation_notes: Partially translated: Entry conditions use returns (extreme move proxy) and price_pos_20 (existing long bias proxy). Exit condition approximates 30% reversion of initial decline. Hold_days_max set to 42 (6 weeks). Full implementation requires custom position-sizing engine and confidence score tracking external to indicator rules.
